reviews.title: Beware - Fake listing!!! Hotel does not exist!!!
reviews.positives: Fraudulent listing - the hotel does not exist, it's a commercial laundry facility and a construction site at this address.  It appears this address has been used for several fake hotels listings, and as soon as it gets removed they list another hotel at the same location with a different name.

reviews.title: I have been to Saigon many times, always a great experience in this area.
reviews.positives: Good location walking distance from main attractions in central Saigon, lots of eating and entertainment within walking distance. Breakfast was ok, however depends on being there at the right time, the fruit etc dissapeared very fast and was slow to be replenished. I guess for the price it was adequate.
reviews.negatives: Room is pretty basisc which is ok for the price, carpets should have been replaced a long time ago, bathroom was from a previous era and bath, leaked onto floor when shower was used, and wifi in our room was terrible to almost non existant. The wifi guy said it would only be fixed after the Tet holiday, to be fair they did offer us an option of moving room, but not sure if that would have helped on the wifi.

reviews.response:
Dear Seunghyeok,
Hope you safely reach back home. We thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. 

We are sorry to hear that the room that we arranged to your recent staying fell short of your expectations. Please be assured that your feedback has been noted and that we shall bear your comments in mind for any future planned changes.

I do hope you will continue to use our services in the future. Looking forward to welcome you back soon in our hotel again.

Best reagrds
Hue Vũ

reviews.title: Please DO NOT STAY HERE!!!!
reviews.text:
This hotel is like stepping into a horror scene from an american movie in the 70’s at highway motel in America!! filthy, smelly and very run down.
They gave me a smokers room where everything from the ceiling to the phones and smoke alarms were yellow!!The room stunk and the carper was minging! 
When I asked to get change to a none smoking room they gave me an even worse room that smelled even worse and when I asked to be changed again they showed me a prestine toom that looked like I was stepping into a completely different hotel and wanted to charge me even more than double of what I paid for it saying it was one of their renovated rooms! It was like the had this con planned for every guest knowing what they are doing and at this point I just didn't want to fall for the con so I asked to see more room where I didn’t have to pay the extortion price they were asking and to top it all off, the bed linnen had blood marks! Like the one you get from bed bugs! It was a complete nightmare!

reviews.title: Helpful staff
reviews.text:
We arrived late at night. The staff helped arrange a taxi to pick us up at the airport at USD10. The staff presented a cake as a honeymoon gift for us. They also gave advice on our trip. They speak fluent English.
The room is larger and newer than what I expected.

reviews.title: Never go
reviews.text:
위치적으로만 괜찮고 다른건 다 별루에요
침대가 푹 꺼져 있고 침구류는 모두 눅눅했으며
샤워기 필터가 녹으로 가득차 있어서  모두 교체 신청을 하였으나 이루어지지 않았고 안보이게 그냥 철재?샤워기로 바꿔놨더라구요 ㅜ 
버그도 있었는지 자고 일어나니 허리쪽에 간지럽고 부풀어 올랐더라구여. 과일 사고 껍질 벗기기위해 칼을 빌리려 하자 9층 레스토랑에 요청 하라해서 했는데 체크아웃시간 알려주고 그때까지 해주겠다고 했으나 그대로 다시 가져옴 ㅠ황당?해서 한국말 하자 짜증내면서 영어로 하라고 인상 팍쓰심 ㅠ 호치민의 다른숙소에 비해 저렴한 편이지만 저렴한 만큼의 저렴한 서비스로  응대해 줍니다 ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.title: nightmare, waste of Money. "Avoid this Place"
reviews.text: This place is a Nightmare. there are lot more options within walking distance that are far much better than this place. I wont return to this hotel. Avoid this Hotel by all cost and choose a different place for your accommodation. No one speaks English, except two or three front desk employees and a door man. There is constant smell of Sewage from the bathroom and I was on the 8th floor. can you imagine how bad the smell would be on the lower floors. The Elevators are from 1950's....Please avoid this place...... friendly

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
I stayed in five hotels in two weeks and this was the worst.
Very busy with europeans and breakfast is no way geared to handle it.
One filter coffee brewer for dozens of people - so it was always empty.
The toaster takes about 6 run-throughs to toast it.
selection was poor - staff in breakfast hall dont want to know.
Hotel located on a really bustling sidewalk - sometimes dozens of travellers waiting for long distance buses blocking it completely.
Only hotel this trip with no safe.
Only hotel this trip where fridge not strong enough to chill water.

reviews.title: Never again
reviews.text: I had a difficult stay mostly because of noise from the park side in my room. I decided to stay again and get a room on the other side of the hotel to prevent the noise. That didn’t work because there is a party street nearby that doesn’t slow down to 3am. I also had difficulty with the restaurant. I asked the price of a meal to bring a guest with me for breakfast and was quoted a price which was tripled at the time of that breakfast. One of my breakfasts was with a Vietnamese girl who was integrated by the staff when joining me for the breakfast…to question her as to if she was going to my room or not.This was highly offensive to me and to her.

reviews.title: Centrico y muy cómodo
reviews.positives: La habitación era muy grande y muy bien ubicada. En los alrededores habia muchos sitios donde ir para cenar.
reviews.negatives: Nuestra habitación era muy tranquila y todo muy bien pero porque daba al parque. A nuestros amigos les toco otra ubicacion y su habitación era muy ruidosa ya que la zona por la parte de atrás en zona de ocio con música muy alta.

reviews.title: Not recommended!
reviews.text: CAUTION! This hotel did not accept my Vietnamese friend to check into our double room, instead I had to pay EXTRA money to let her check in. Overall service is VERY POOR, front desk is unfriendly and impolite. My room was not clean, bed sheets looked used. If you want to sleep in the night, DO NOT BOOK HERE because my room was extremly NOISY from outside. At the restaurant, 6 employees who have nothing to do at all stand next to your table and watch you eat breakfast. Worst of all, they did not accept my VISA card so I was forced to pay cash for check-out. My complaints were never answered. NOT RECOMMENDED!!! You get better service and much better rooms at other hotels around.

reviews.title: Not worth the money by a long way

J'ai demandé un late check-out pour un vol dans la soirée. Il m'a coûté pratiquement la moitié de la réservation.  Je comprends mais je trouve cela un peu exagéré pour 3h de plus. 

L'hotel est vieillot et les équipements sont moyens. Pour une nuit cela suffit.

reviews.title: Scam! Rude! ROACHES!
reviews.text: This room is not clean at all and the front desk tries to charge you for everything. My friend who was staying in a hostel nearby came to my room to try on one of my outfits for an activity the following day the front desk charged me 600,000 VND even though he was only there for less than 20 minutes. They said that I had to pay for an extra guest for the night. Also, I encountered roaches in my room when I told the front desk the employee acted as if he did not believe me and sent housekeeping to doublecheck. Upon telling housekeeping that both roaches had crawled behind the mirror, he brought spray and sprayed the room making it smell like fumes. On top of that the couch has stains. The wall is scuffed and the paint is chipping and it’s overall not a well kept establishment and don’t try to exchange money here as they will scam you with an illegitimate exchange rate.

Jerome was dingy and dirty looking. I was afraid to stay there, so I went to look for another hotel. By then it was after 10 PM and too late to book another room elsewhere. I felt unsafe and was unable to sleep. The next day I did receive a better room. The hotel lobby does not look like the pictures that are advertised.

reviews.text: You get an old/run down rooms with rude staff and bad attitude. It was quite noisy till early hours of the morning. Avoid headache. Never staying there again.

reviews.title: Schöner Aufenthalt im Liberty Hotel
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist erstklassig, mittendrin im Geschehen, Restaurants, Bars, Shops, Märkte, alles in kurzer Distanz erreichbar. Leider dadurch natürlich Straßenlärm. Das Frühstück ist im 9. Stock und ist gut und ausreichend - asiatisch und europäisch. Uns hat es der Aufenthalt dort sehr gut gefallen.
reviews.negatives: Wir hatten freundlicherweise ein Upgrade erhalten. Leider war dieses Upgrade für ein Zimmer im 8. Stock, direkt unter dem Frühstücksraum. Eine Reisegruppe hatte um 6.30 Uhr Frühstück und wir keinen Schlaf mehr. Die Schallisolierung der Fenster könnte besser sein.

reviews.title: No rest because of construction
reviews.text:
I booked a deluxe room with a double bed, but upon arrival was told it had been changed to a twin room on the 8th floor, directly under construction on the 9th floor (?!?). Staff assured me that work would stop after 4 pm and not continue on Sunday. However, noisy construction started early in the Sunday morning, even before 8 am.

I have stayed here a few times in the past, but after this experience I will not return and do not recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm tệ
reviews.negatives:
Khách sạn rất cũ, vẫn còn phải dùng chìa khóa, không phải thẻ từ. Đèn trong phòng chỉ toàn màu vàng, nên với người không quen sẽ thấy khá chói mắt và khó chịu. Vì khách sạn cũ nên các mảng tường và phần đầu giường trông có vẻ không sạch sẽ, cả phòng tắm cũng vậy. Đèn đầu giường của mình còn bị hỏng và phải sửa hết hơn 30 phút. 
Mình có liên hệ Housekeeping mượn bàn là để là áo dài thì được báo bàn là không mang đi được mà bạn nhân viên bảo sẽ lên lấy đồ và giúp mình là mà không nói gì thêm, tới khi xong bạn mang theo hóa đơn là quần áo hết 25k. Số tiền không nhiều nhưng tốt hơn các bạn nên thông báo phí trước với khách. 
Mình cũng cần xuất hóa đơn đỏ, khi xuống lễ tân các bạn hỏi mình có xuất cho khoản là quần áo không thì mình nhắn là không, mỗi tiền phòng thôi, các bạn không nói thêm gì tới hôm sau lại gọi cho mình bảo lúc đấy mình có nói không cần xuất VAT nữa. Mình không cần thì gửi thông tin doanh nghiệp cho các bạn để làm gì?

reviews.title: Keep Looking
reviews.text: Having been to Ho Chi Minh City twice I try to stay at different properties and have yet to find one that I think has the right mix of location, amenities, and vaue.  The Liberty 4 does well with the location being in the backpacker area and accross the street from a park that's fun to people watch in.  It however doesn't do well in terms of it's room comfort/ambience.  The rooms are out of the early 80s and for the price don't represent the best value.  The rooftop restaurant where you eat breakfast is nice with it's views over the park.

One man's meat is another man's poison.
reviews.positives: Reception staff are nice and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Stayed on the 3rd floor, windows next to room were opened.  Since weather was hot, windows should be closed as we can feel the heat from the outside. The waiter did not understand me when I asked him about the yoghurt.

reviews.title: Uncomfortable. Very disappointing.
reviews.text: I booked liberty hotel Saigon parkview on line for two nights. After arrival I expected to extend as I will be in Saigon for two weeks.  I booked a room for two adults. At check in I was told that regardless of a two person booking, only I could be in the room after 10:00 pm at night.  Unless I could show a marriage certificate. Desk clerk said that is the law.  But he said if I pay an additional 400,000 fee, they ignore the law.  I know this old law no longer exists and told him so.  He had no answer.  The hotel is running an extortion scam on their guests.  Also, they cut corners in other ways such as cleaning, accessories and overpricing food. Too bad I had prepaid. But thankfully only for two nights. There are many nice ( friendly and honest) hotels in this area so it was easy to relocate after the two nights expired. And less expensive ones also.

reviews.title: Liberty 4 Hotel
reviews.text: When I made the reservation for the Liberty 4 Hotel, I stated that we were coming in at 3:30 AM; I made the reservation for that day.  When we arrived at the hotel about 5:30 AM, the man behind the desk was absolutely insenstive and disrespectful.  He insisted we could not check in until 1:PM - I said we have been traveling 30 hours from San Franisco; Vancouver, BC Canada; Seoul, Korea; Beijing, China and then Nanning-Waxu, China and finally Ho Chi Minh.  We needed a bed.  He insisted we could not check in.  Finally I asked if he had a room if we paid extra.    I became very angry and said I wanted my money back and he refused because I went thru your agency.  I then went next door to the Hotel and they gave us a room until 1PM for almost nothing.  I would never recommend Liberty 4 Hotel but would definitely recommend the next door hotel for the fine courteous helpful staff.  When we returned to HCMH we used their hotel again. We also got a massage at the Liberty 4 Hotel massage parlor.  I ended up black and blue and sore for five days.  All the staff was interested in was the tip.  When we were assigned a masseuse - we were told to be sure to tip.  When we were through with the massage; we were asked for a tip.  Gave a tip and was asked for more.  Very unprofessional.  Would never recommend this massage parlor nor the hotel.
reviews.positives: Best part was the breakfast! The bell boys were terrific!
reviews.negatives: I was disgusted with the hotel and the attitude of employees.

reviews.title: Liberty 4
reviews.text: As above was not impressed with being woken up shortly after 5am to loud music and loudspeaker.  I guess that is the way of life but hotel should perhaps look into a little more glazing on their windows.  Had previously stayed at Liberty 3 which we think is a better deal even though you do get more traffic noise.  Staff on reception were friendly and gave us an upgrade without us asking.  Ate at the restaurant on a previous visit when there was a smorgasboard.  This time we were only 2 of 4 in the restaurant and the food plus the service left a lot to be desired. Rooms are reasonable and the outside terrace attached to the room was good for watching the goings on in the street below.

reviews.title: Would recommend Liberty 1 and 3 over this one
reviews.text: Read the reviews on the net that this hotel was near Ben Thanh market. So we took the airport svc bus 152 to Ben Thanh market and asked for directions when we got there. Some pp told us it was a 5-10mins walk. Not sure what speed they were talking about but it took us 15-20mins to get there...this hotel is nowhere close to Ben Thanh market. Liberty 1 hotel is by far much closer to the market. We managed to get to Liberty 3 hotel and they told us Liberty 3 was a 2 mins walk away down the street so we walked some more. Again it turned out to be a at least 5 mins walk, not 2 mins. Checkin was fast, not a problem. Room was clean and very basic and spacious but dimly lit and depressing altogether. Would never want to stay there again and only booked this hotel cos we had a late night flight in (the next 2 nights we stayed at the majestic saigon). Do not think it is even value for money at SGD 60 a night at all and the breakfast was horrid despite the spread. The pho was oily and the choice limited.

reviews.title: My last stay in this hotel when back in Saigon
reviews.text:
Stayed in this hotel several times whenever in HCMC and liked their service that's why we came back. But this time was a complete nightmare.
Booked weeks ahead for a superior deluxe double room. Upon checking in, was given a deluxe room with twin beds. Complained and asked for the exact room we paid for & was told that they were fully booked. Receptionist & supervisor were both arrogant & unhelpful. We settled for the twin room for a night, but demanded a change of room the next couple of days. They promised to relocate us the next morning.
That next morning was another nightmare entirely. Wasted a day waiting for a room. Called reception several times and was told they would call us when a room is available but they didn't. Got so pissed, stormed the reception and learned that they had forgotten about our request. No apology was given. So arrogant and irresponsible reception! Got our new, mediocre room at past 3pm.
Will never ever stay here again.

the liberty 4 was fine for a short stay, though i think we were placed in one of the 'unrefurbished' rooms on the lower floors - while the room was large, the walls and curtains were brown, the bathroom needed remodelling, and the window looked out onto the side of a building!
large tv with all the channels, and an average breakfast.

reviews.title: Good Location
reviews.text:
I have been staying in this hotel for several years and continues to find it goos for me. However, this time was exception! I was shocked and astonished to find small bugs/ croaches crawling in one of the 2 beds when coming into the room!I did not bring this out to the staff as thought it was small matter but never did I realised that I was bitten on the neck and hands despite sleeping on the other bed!
It dawned on me that I would have to find myself another better hotel the next time I visited Vietnam!
reviews.positives: A big smile from the faces of staff !

reviews.title: Good location, comfortable rooms but noisy traffic
reviews.text: This hotel is quite central so to walk around/taxi about is jsut a short distance from the main places in HCM. Although it takes a 10 min taxi ride to the main tourist attractions, the hotel of this location is still not bad. Lots of travel agent shops to book tours nearby and bars to have  adrink nearby. If you want to be nearer the markets and museums, this hotel is slightly further compared to others but still not too far...a brisk walk will get u to Bin than market in about 20mins-30mins. the rooms are comfortable and the break fast is alright. the main complaint is the noise of the traffic can still be heard from the rooms.good staff and very friendly with most being able to speak english to help you on any queries

reviews.title: Noisy construction and rude staff
reviews.text: Stayed here during 29/08-01/09 and the receptionists were terrible. My room was placed directly under construction in the room above causing terrible noise and they gave us this room in spite of that. When I complained of the noise (this was 10pm and they were still renovating) the reception staff told us to pack up our things and move to another room. No compensation (laundry fee waived, free water or anything). When we checked out I asked for a slightly later checkout time and the reception *** flat out refused and just asked for extra money. Not a single apology or anything considering the nonsense I was put through. Appalling attitude from receptionist *** and avoid this place if you don't want to be put in a construction site and told to pack up in the middle of the night.

reviews.title: Better value elsewhere
reviews.text: Tired, worn Liberty Hotel Saigon Parkview. Showing signs of age everywhere.  The renovated rooms are good, if you can get one.  Everything else is well worn. Don't look at the carpet in your room, it's kinda scary.  The lounge furniture in reception is dirty and greasy.  The only thing going for this hotel is the location, which is great.  So much better value around the corner or down the road.

reviews.title: Falling Short
reviews.text: The Liberty Hotel Saigon Parkview is starting to look tired. The rooms are dark, and unless you get a renovated room, it is a sad stay.  It is in a great location but there are now new hotel offerings that provide better value.

reviews.title: Average
reviews.text:
My stay at the hotel was overall pretty average. The location was definitely a plus—convenient and close to everything I needed. The staff at the front desk were friendly and welcoming, which made check-in pleasant.

The room itself was a bit dated and could use some renovations, but it was functional. One standout was the cleaning staff—they did a great job keeping the room spotless every day, which I appreciated.

There wasn’t anything particularly bad or particularly impressive about the stay. It was just okay—not bad, but not memorable either.

Friend stayed on the 5th floor with an accessible balcony and found it to be too noisy. Both rooms were on the street side. Hotel is not cooled only the rooms. Need to keep the plastic card key in the wall switch to allow the room to stay cool and take the metal key with you. I would get a nicer hotel next time.

reviews.title: Won't stay again
reviews.text: The location of the Hotel was good.  The staff, on arrival were friendly.  The room was average but not 4 star.  There was mould in the bathroom on the tiles.  We had an early flight to catch in the morning.  Our account was paid in full prior to our arrival.  However, the young man on the counter in the morning was most uncooperative.  We requested our passports but were told it would take 5 minutes per room (we had 3 rooms alongside each other) to check the mini bar.  We explained that we hadn't used the mini bar but he still refused to give back our passports.  We waited 15 minutes before he finally provided our passports.  I have stayed at many hotels in Vietnam (I am living here for 12 months) and never have I been treated so poorly by staff.  I will not stay at this hotel again and will advise others to stay at the Vien Dong which is down the street (currently undergoing renovations).

reviews.title: A decent choice for one night in Ho Chi Minh
reviews.text: The Liberty Hotel is located right near the backpacker area and is pretty centrally located for the attractions of downtown Ho Chi Minh. The restaurant on the top of the hotels is really bright and has a pretty big breakfast buffet and good views of the city. The room however was a bit depressing. The beds were hard and very small (we had 2 single beds). The window looked out onto a side wall of the hotel. We were only there for one night when we arrived in Vietnam, so it was what I expected. Would probably not stay for a longer time - there are a lot of other options in the city with more character and better locations.

However, this is not a good experience.

Yes, there was an egg station, but no yogurt and limited breads and other buffet items. 

The room was large and clean. Balcony was good to view the passing traffic.

reviews.title: Good location, nice room
reviews.text:
We stayed for one night... I emailed prior to our arrival for an airport transfer which never turned up... This was annoying!
The room was really nice, although it had no window! This actually suited us as we were really tired so were able to sleep in without being woken by the sunlight.
Large comfy bed, nice bathroom with warm shower.
Good location in District 1, close to the market and to lots of bars and restaurants.
Staff were ok, a bit disinterested.
All in all it was quite average, probably could have found something cheaper for the same experience! Not the best place we've stayed but certainly not the worst.
